message:
fix: outcome lattice nodes too small for "Cancelled"/"Panicked"

Circle radius: 24→30px. Node spacing: 95→120px. ViewBox widened
from 400 to 510px. Longer labels (>5 chars) use 9px font instead
of 11px. Severity numbers positioned relative to nodeR. Arrow
endpoints use nodeR for proper gap calculation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
